mapper.select: SELECT id, batch_date as "batchDate", period_start as "periodStart", period_end as "periodEnd", gateway_type as "gatewayType", reconciliation_method as "reconciliationMethod", matched_count as "matchedCount", mismatch_count as "mismatchCount", auto_resolved_count as "autoResolvedCount", state_id as "stateId", flow_id as "flowId", created_time as "createdTime", last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM reconciliation_batches WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM reconciliation_batches GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY "count" DESC
